title: nassella neesiana
intro: Nassella neesiana, also known as Poa neesiana, is a perennial grass native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Nassella neesiana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to be used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
